freedomKeys.name: flow05_points_formula
freedomKeys.semantics: Point formula applied by PointsCalculator after reading the stored questionnaire score.
freedomKeys.visibleProof: points-breakdown and points-earned values in the completion screen

freedomKeys.name: flow05_level_thresholds
freedomKeys.semantics: Point totals required to reach levels above level 1.
freedomKeys.visibleProof: current-level value in the completion screen

freedomKeys.name: flow05_achievement_criteria
freedomKeys.semantics: Tenant-tunable achievement unlock criteria evaluated after completion.
freedomKeys.visibleProof: achievement and streak labels in completion or achievement states

freedomKeys.name: flow05_streak_grace_hours
freedomKeys.semantics: Hours after local midnight that still count toward continuing a streak.
freedomKeys.visibleProof: streak-count explanation in populated completion evidence

freedomKeys.name: flow05_streak_multiplier_step
freedomKeys.semantics: Multiplier gain added per streak day.
freedomKeys.visibleProof: points-breakdown multiplier when multiplier is surfaced

freedomKeys.name: flow05_streak_multiplier_max
freedomKeys.semantics: Maximum point multiplier allowed from streak progression.
freedomKeys.visibleProof: points-breakdown multiplier cap when multiplier is surfaced

freedomKeys.name: flow05_social_broadcast_enabled
freedomKeys.semantics: Controls whether completion social-sharing surfaces may broadcast progress.

freedomKeys.name: flow05_ml_cooldown_days
freedomKeys.semantics: Minimum days between learning-path adaptation changes for a learner.
freedomKeys.visibleProof: curriculum-updating state and adaptation pending messaging

freedomKeys.name: flow05_ml_max_changes
freedomKeys.semantics: Maximum number of curriculum adaptations allowed per evaluation window.
freedomKeys.visibleProof: curriculum-updating state and adaptation pending messaging

adaptationCandidates.reason: Smallest proof surface: changes earned points without changing roles or flow topology.
adaptationCandidates.expectedVisibleChange: Completion result shows +25 total points with base 15 and bonus 10.

adaptationCandidates.reason: A tenant can be more forgiving about late-night learning activity.
adaptationCandidates.expectedVisibleChange: Streak explanation shows a four-hour grace window.

passCriteria: At least one FREEDOM key has name, currentValue, semantics, irCitation, profile, and adaptationTypes.
Tenant A can apply a TYPE-A value change without altering MACHINE constraints.
The adapted value is visible in tenant-a-v1.0.1 screenshots.
